creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you test the fix proposed upstream?

(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #0)
> Since Clang doesn't support it, switch to GCC.

-no-integrated-as would be less invasive. However, Clang supports rlwimi since https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/6e9110abe923
